case_title: POST STREET TOWERS VS. MONICA GUZMAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF POST STREET TOWERS AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN, MONICA DOES 1 THROUGH 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POST STREET TOWERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUZMAN, MONICA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 737 POST ST. #1011, S.F. CA. 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
